# Clippy — Real-time Twitch Stream Intelligence API
> Detects chat spikes, classifies moments with AI, and auto-clips highlights. Open API — no API keys, no signup.

Base URL: https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app

## How it works

1. Firehose ingests Twitch chat across all channels in real-time via websocket.
2. Per-channel rate tracking detects spikes (5s burst vs 30s baseline). Only channels with 3000+ viewers trigger spike events.
3. On watched channels, Claude classifies the mood (hype, funny, rage, clutch, awkward, wholesome, drama, shock, sad) and describes what happened in one sentence.
4. Every spike on a watched channel auto-creates a Twitch clip. The AI description becomes the clip title.
5. Classified moments are reported on-chain to a Solana program that settles binary prediction markets trustlessly.

## Free Endpoints

- GET /api — Service info, all endpoints
- GET /health — Status: connected, channel count, msg/s
- GET /trending — Top 10 channels by chat burst rate
- GET /alerts — SSE stream of real-time spike events. Query param: ?channel=name to filter
- GET /channel-stats/:name — Live channel stats (rate, burst, baseline, vibe, viewers)
- GET /moments/:id — Get a specific captured moment by ID (includes chatSnapshot, mood, clipUrl)
- GET /moments/latest/:channel — Most recent moment for a channel
- GET /moments/:id/classify — Trigger LLM classification on a moment (returns mood + description)
- GET /clip/:id — Embeddable clip page with Twitch player at the spike timestamp

## POST Endpoints

- POST /trending — Full trending list with custom limit. Body: {"limit": 20}
- POST /channel — Full stats for one channel including recent messages. Body: {"channel": "caseoh_"}
- POST /spikes — All channels currently spiking, enriched with VOD timestamps. Body: {"withinMinutes": 5}
- POST /summarize — LLM-powered summary of channel chat (sentiment, topics). Body: {"channel": "caseoh_"}
- POST /moments — List captured spike moments. Body: {"channel": "caseoh_", "clipWorthyOnly": true, "limit": 20}
- POST /watch/:channel — SSE stream with LLM-classified spikes + auto-clipping. Auto-closes ~2 min after stream goes offline.

## Watchlist (controls auto-clipping)

- POST /watch-clip/:channel — Add channel to auto-clip watchlist (enables LLM classification + Twitch clipping)
- DELETE /watch-clip/:channel — Remove from watchlist
- GET /watch-clip — List watched channels

## Channel Tracking (lightweight rate tracking)

- POST /track/:channel — Start tracking a channel's chat rate
- DELETE /track/:channel — Stop tracking

## Twitch Auth + Clips

- GET /auth/twitch — OAuth flow to connect Twitch account (enables clip creation)
- POST /clip/:id — Manually create a Twitch clip for a captured moment

## Quick Start

```bash
# See what's trending
curl https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app/trending

# Get channel stats
curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"channel": "caseoh_"}' \
  https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app/channel

# Listen for spikes on a channel (SSE)
curl -N https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app/alerts?channel=caseoh_

# Watch a channel with AI classification
curl -N -X POST \
  https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app/watch/caseoh_

# Get latest moment
curl https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app/moments/latest/caseoh_
```

## Spike Event Format (from /alerts or /watch)

```json
{
  "type": "spike",
  "channel": "caseoh_",
  "viewers": 54800,
  "burst": 21.6,
  "baseline": 12.7,
  "jumpPercent": 70,
  "mood": "funny",
  "description": "Chat erupted after streamer rage quit and blamed the controller",
  "clipWorthy": true,
  "vodTimestamp": "2h19m19s",
  "vodUrl": "https://www.twitch.tv/videos/2730908290?t=2h19m19s",
  "timestamp": "2026-03-25T04:15:00.000Z"
}
```

## Moment Format (from /moments endpoints)

```json
{
  "id": 19,
  "channel": "caseoh_",
  "jumpPercent": 160,
  "mood": "funny",
  "description": "Chat spammed LOL after streamer fell off the map",
  "clipUrl": "https://clips.twitch.tv/ImportantHyperTapirKeepo-CZO4e0KlJ14f7ljI",
  "vodTimestamp": "1h42m10s",
  "vodUrl": "https://www.twitch.tv/videos/2730908290?t=1h42m10s",
  "chatSnapshot": ["user1: LMAOOO", "user2: NO WAY", "user3: KEKW"],
  "clipWorthy": true,
  "vibe": "funny",
  "burst": 21.6,
  "baseline": 12.7
}
```
